*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Abscess to Right cervical / Measures 1.3 cm x 1.0 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Pack with iodoform gauze daily.

Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 0.8x0.6, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
